headline: How The FedEx (FDX) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Valuation Targets
summary: The latest FedEx valuation work trims the modeled fair value only slightly to about US$401.89 per share from roughly US$402.39, signaling a very small adjustment to the price target. Analysts are actively debating how much of FedEx’s freight spin potential and recent execution progress is already reflected in that figure, with more positive views tying the number to the freight separation story and long term earnings power, and more cautious views pointing to an already full share price. As...
